_help_Name: Descriptive name of the rear suspension
Name: Sedan DoubleWishbone Rear
_help_VehicleFrameInertia: If true, arm/upright moments of inertia are aligned with vehicle frame. Defaults to false.
_help_Angles: Static camber and toe angles in degrees (optional)
_help_Spindle: Spindle/hub properties (mass, COM coordinate, principal moments of inertia, dimensions)
_help_Upright: Upright/knuckle properties connecting spindle to control arms
_help_UpperControlArm: Upper control arm (UCA) properties, chassis mounting coordinates, and upright connection coordinate

Upper Control Arm._help_BushingData_Optional: Optional bushing template: 'Bushing Data': { 'Stiffness Linear': 1e7, 'Damping Linear': 1e5, 'Stiffness Rotational': 1e5, 'Damping Rotational': 1e3 }

_help_LowerControlArm: Lower control arm (LCA) properties, chassis mounting coordinates, and upright connection coordinate

Lower Control Arm._help_BushingData_Optional: Optional bushing template: same as Upper Control Arm

_help_Tierod: Tie-rod connection joint locations on chassis and upright

Tierod._help_Tierod_Optional: Optional parameters to define tierod body: 'Mass' (double), 'Inertia' (vector3), 'Radius' (double), 'Bushing Data' (object)

_help_Spring: Spring mounting coordinates, free (unloaded) length, and linear/nonlinear force characteristics

Spring._help_Spring_Optional: Optional parameters: 'Preload' (double), 'Minimum Length' (double), 'Maximum Length' (double) for travel stops. Or replace 'Spring Coefficient' with 'Spring Curve Data': [[displacement, force], ...] for lookup tables.

_help_Shock: Shock absorber mounting coordinates and linear/nonlinear damping characteristics

Shock._help_Shock_Optional: Optional parameters: 'Degressivity Compression' (double), 'Degressivity Expansion' (double). Or replace 'Damping Coefficient' with 'Damping Curve Data': [[velocity, force], ...] for lookup tables.

_help_Axle: Rotational inertia of the drive axle shaft
